title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kharagpur - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kharagpur - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur:
IIT Kharagpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
